ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the book */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the book */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., textbook, reference) */,
  "copyright_year" INTEGER /* Year of copyright */,
  "copyright_holder" TEXT /* Holder of the copyright */,
  "print_isbn" TEXT /* Print International Standard Book Number */,
  "electronic_isbn" TEXT /* Electronic International Standard Book Number */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the book */,
  "language_collection" TEXT /* Collection of languages */,
  "ebook_package_id" INTEGER /* eBook package identifier */,
  "english_package_name" TEXT /* Name of the English package */,
  "german_package_name" TEXT /* Name of the German package */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series the book belongs to */,
  "volume_number" INTEGER /* Volume number in the series */,
  "doi_url" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier URL */,
  "openurl" TEXT /* OpenURL for accessing the book */,
  "subject_classification_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject classification of the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the book */,
  "imprint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the imprint of the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "book_format" TEXT /* Format of the book (e.g., hardcover, paperback, eBook) */,
  "number_of_pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "book_description" TEXT /* Description of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_imprint_id FOREIGN KEY ("imprint_id") REFERENCES imprints ("imprint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography or description of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author (e.g., university, organization) */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the publishing company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the series */,
  "print_issn" TEXT /* Print ISSN for the series */,
  "electronic_issn" TEXT /* Electronic ISSN for the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imprints" (
  "imprint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each imprint */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the imprint */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the imprint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imprint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the book was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subject_classification" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ebook_packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eBook package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the eBook package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the eBook package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user writing the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the book (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book receiving the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year when the award was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_awards_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book being recommended */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "recommendation_text" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_recommendations_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)
